---
id: registers-a-new-user
title: "Registers a new user"
description: "Creates a new user account. On Cloud, the user lands in `pending_payment` until the subscription service confirms payment. On self-hosted, the user is active immediately."
sidebar_label: "Registers a new user"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/dawarich-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";

import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Registers a new user"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/auth/register"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Creates a new user account. On Cloud, the user lands in `pending_payment` until the subscription service confirms payment. On self-hosted, the user is active immediately.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
